data.title: RED: Write failing test for AcliClient.delete_issue_link()
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing unit test for a new AcliClient.delete_issue_link(link_id) instance method that deletes a specific Jira issue link by its ID.

## Test Approach
Given: A mock ACLI Go binary that accepts link delete command
When: acli_client.delete_issue_link("12345") is called
Then: ACLI command includes the link ID, method returns successfully

Given: ACLI Go returns 404 (link not found)
When: delete_issue_link("12345") is called
Then: Raises subprocess.CalledProcessError (caller handles 404 semantics)

Given: ACLI Go returns non-zero exit for other errors
When: delete_issue_link("12345") is called
Then: Raises subprocess.CalledProcessError

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py (Edit: add test functions for delete_issue_link)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file contains test functions for delete_issue_link() happy path, 404, and error
  Verify: grep -q "delete_issue_link" tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py
- [ ] Tests fail when run (RED — method does not exist yet)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "delete_issue_link" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
